arts.ttl: Neto taps home to score first goal for Chelsea!
arts.sum: Pedro Neto tapped home from close-range for his first Chelsea goal in the Carabao Cup tie against Barrow at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: Chelsea fans call on Enzo Maresca to 'bench whoever we have to' in order to get one 'Team B' star into his main XI after a dazzling Carabao Cup display
arts.sum: A much-changed Chelsea side made a brilliant start to Tuesday's Carabao Cup clash with Barrow by scoring three goals inside the opening half an hour at Stamford Bridge.

arts.ttl: 'What a finish that is!' | Nkunku doubles Chelsea's lead with cheeky flick!
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku doubles Chelsea's lead with a cheeky flick against Barrow in the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: 'What a finish that is!' | Nkunku doubles Chelsea's lead with cheeky flick!
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku doubles Chelsea's lead with a cheeky flick against Barrow in the Carabao Cup.

arts.ttl: 'Genius!' | Nkunku fires Chelsea ahead after brilliant Felix assist
arts.sum: Christopher Nkunku opens the scoring for Chelsea against Barrow in their Carabao Cup tie.

arts.ttl: Gary Neville suggests radical Premier League rule change that would impact Arsenal, Chelsea and Spurs
arts.sum: In the group stages of the EFL Trophy, a competition that Arsenal, Chelsea and Tottenham U21s are involved in, if a game ends in a draw, a penalty shootout takes place with the winning team earning a bonus point. Former Premier League defender turned pundit Gary Neville has suggested a major shake-up of how points are awarded in the league, which would have a major impact at the end of the season.

The Blues were extremely close to finalising an agreement for the 25-year-old this summer, but the move failed to materialise due to several small issues and he joined Galatasaray on loan instead. How close were Chelsea to signing Victor Osimhen this summer?

arts.ttl: Report: £70m Chelsea player unlikely to leave despite recent admission as relationship with Maresca is good
arts.sum: He considered a move in the summer.

arts.ttl: Chelsea team news: Enzo Maresca makes 11 changes for Barrow EFL Cup tie
arts.sum: Enzo Maresca rotates his entire Chelsea XI for Tuesday night's EFL Cup third-round tie at home to Barrow.
